chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1225 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 30.03.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. files comments of Executive Engineer, Drainage Division, Khairpur (respondent No.3), which reflects that the petitioner was appointed as Beldar (BPS-2) and he was wrongly promoted to the post of Darogha (BPS-5); hence, such inquiry was conducted and in consequence of thereof the promotion of the petitioner was found against the rules and he was demoted to the post of Beldar. It is further stated that thereafter the petitioner remained absent from his duty, hence, his salary was stopped due to such reason. Subsequently, on 22.03.2023, the petitioner submitted his joining report; as such FO-2 Form was submitted to the District Accounts Officer, Khairpur for starting the petitioner’s salary. It appears that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed and it is due to such reason that none is in attendance on his behalf. Hence, in view of the aforesaid statement of respondent No.3, this petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
